text-opt-bm · alpha

Official alpha task results

Results for the four tasks designated as the official alpha set: LLM routing, optimizer generalization, and SLM compression at two storage budgets.

  • statusEvery task on this page is official. Historical and legacy results are in the complete results post.
  • generalizationOnline optimization feedback is separated from sealed-test evaluation.
  • plotsCurves step at accepted submissions and use optimizer-active time.
Official alpha

Official task results

All four official alpha tasks · complete N=5 model series only
gpt-5.6-sol highgpt-5.5 high
Completeness: gpt-5.6-sol high: 4/4 complete N=5 task series · gpt-5.5 high: 4/4 complete N=5 task series · gpt-5.5 low: 2/4 complete N=5 task series. The aggregate is shown only for complete four-task series. Bands are ±1 standard deviation across trial-index aggregates.
Every official alpha task · raw scores
Complete series only: every plotted model/task line contains five trials.
